# datadog_authn_mappings (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about existing Datadog AuthN mappings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datadog_authn_mappings" "example" {
  filter = "example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Filter all mappings by the given string.
- `page_number` (Number) Specific page number to return.
- `page_size` (Number) Size for a given page. The maximum allowed value is 100.

### Read-Only

- `authn_mappings` (Block List) Array of returned AuthN Mappings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--authn_mappings))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--authn_mappings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `authn_mappings`

Read-Only:

- `attribute_key` (String) Key portion of a key/value pair of the attribute sent from the Identity Provider.
- `attribute_value` (String) Value portion of a key/value pair of the attribute sent from the Identity Provider.
- `id` (String) ID of the AuthN Mapping.
- `saml_assertion_attribute_id` (String) The ID of the SAML assertion attribute.
